description: A smiling farmer holding a government subsidy document, with a smartphone displaying the AgriKisan app, and icons representing fertilizer, electricity, and credit in the background.
prompt: A photograph of a middle‑aged farmer wearing a light‑blue shirt and a straw hat, standing in a sunlit rice field and holding a government subsidy document in one hand while a smartphone showing the AgriKisan app is displayed in the other. Behind him, large flat icons of a fertilizer bag, a lightning bolt, and a credit card float against a soft blue sky, illuminated by gentle afternoon light.

description: A collage showing a farmer using a tablet with three language options (Hindi, English, Tamil) displayed, surrounded by icons of crops, weather, and government schemes.
prompt: A photograph of a middle‑aged Indian farmer wearing a faded blue shirt and a straw hat, holding a modern tablet that shows three selectable language buttons labeled in Devanagari script, English alphabet, and Tamil script. Around the farmer, a collage of flat icons is arranged: a golden wheat sheaf, a green rice stalk, a bright orange corn ear, a sun partially covered by a blue cloud, and a stylized government document icon with a teal ribbon. The scene is set in a bright field under a clear sky with warm sunlight casting soft shadows.

description: A farmer holding a printed Soil Health Card while looking at a laptop screen that displays a color‑coded soil nutrient map, with a green field behind them.
prompt: A photograph of a middle‑aged farmer wearing a blue denim shirt and a straw hat, holding a printed soil health card in his left hand while his right hand rests on an open laptop that shows a color‑coded soil nutrient map with red, yellow and green zones. Behind him a lush green field stretches under a clear blue sky, with a faint line of wheat in the distance. Soft midday sunlight creates gentle shadows that emphasize the texture of the card and the glow of the laptop screen.

description: A high‑resolution aerial view of a green field with a drone hovering, overlaid with sensor icons and AI data charts, illustrating modern smart farming.
prompt: A photograph taken from a high, slightly angled view of a vibrant green agricultural field, with a compact quadcopter drone hovering a few meters above the crop rows. Floating semi‑transparent icons of soil‑moisture sensors, weather stations, and a holographic line chart in teal and amber hover over the field, representing AI data streams. The scene is illuminated by bright midday sunlight, casting crisp shadows that highlight the contrast between the verdant field and the metallic drone.

description: A close‑up of a farmer's hands holding a smartphone, displaying the AgriKisan app home screen, with a background of a simple village setting and a subtle Wi‑Fi icon.
prompt: A photograph of a farmer's weather‑worn hands tightly gripping a modern smartphone, the screen clearly showing the AgriKisan app home screen with icons and text. Behind the hands, a modest village scene unfolds: a thatched roof, a mud wall edged with a few green vegetable leaves, and a faint Wi‑Fi signal icon rendered in soft sky‑blue above the structures. Warm late‑morning sunlight casts gentle highlights on the hands and device, emphasizing earthy brown tones of the skin and the rustic background.

description: A farmer holding a smartphone with a bright app interface showing weather icons, a voice microphone symbol, and a simple dashboard, set against a backdrop of a sunny field.
prompt: A photograph of a middle‑aged farmer wearing a straw hat, a faded green shirt, and denim overalls, standing in a sun‑lit wheat field where rows of tall stalks stretch toward a clear blue sky. He holds a modern smartphone in his right hand, and the screen displays a vivid app interface with a golden‑yellow sun icon, a light‑gray cloud icon, a blue rain‑drop icon, a dark‑gray microphone symbol, and a simple dashboard of greenish‑teal bar charts. Soft midday sunlight casts gentle shadows on the farmer and the crop, highlighting the phone screen and the surrounding field.

description: A futuristic farm scene showing a farmer holding a tablet with AI-generated crop advice overlay, green fields in the background, and subtle Indian motifs.
prompt: A photograph of a middle‑aged Indian farmer standing in a field of bright leafy green crops, holding a sleek dark teal tablet that projects holographic icons and text for crop advice. Behind him, rows of modern sensor poles and a low‑flying drone hover over the field under a clear early‑morning sky, while his traditional hand‑woven cotton turban displays subtle mahogany‑colored Indian motif embroidery.

description: A clean, simple logo representing the Soil Health Portal, featuring agricultural elements with green and earth-tone accents.
A subtle, high‑resolution texture of Indian farmland fields, showing earthy soil tones and faint green crop rows, used as a background pattern.
prompt: A close-up photograph of an Indian farmland showing a wide expanse of rich, earthy brownish soil interspersed with faint, linear rows of young green paddy plants, the soil surface slightly cracked and dotted with small stones, under soft natural daylight that casts gentle shadows across the field. In the distance, a low line of palm trees marks the horizon and a thin mist hangs over the field, adding depth while keeping the overall tone muted.

description: A minimalist repeating grid of tiny light‑gray dots creating a micro‑dot texture, adding a faint technical overlay to the section.
prompt: A photograph of a seamless repeating grid of tiny light gray dots on a smooth off‑white surface, showing an evenly spaced lattice that covers the entire frame. Soft, diffused lighting highlights the fine texture of the dots, creating a faint technical overlay. The composition is flat and minimal, with no additional objects or colors beyond the subtle gray and background tone.

description: A stylized illustration of a map highlighting agricultural regions with emerald-green tones and earthy textures, conveying a modern yet grounded vibe.
prompt: An illustration of a regional map with clearly drawn borders, rivers, and roadways, where the agricultural zones are colored in vivid emerald green and the surrounding terrain is rendered in a warm, earthy brown texture. Small icons of a tractor, wheat stalks, and a farmer holding a tablet are placed on the fields to convey the farming theme. The overall composition balances detailed map elements with subtle texture, suitable for a modern agriculture website.

description: A subtle, low‑opacity earthy soil texture pattern used as an overlay background, giving a natural feel to the section.
prompt: A close‑up photograph of dark reddish‑brown clay soil containing fine particles, tiny stone fragments, and faint root pieces, captured under soft diffused daylight with gentle shadows that reveal a seamless, detailed texture.

description: A vibrant photo of a wheat farmer in Punjab standing in a golden field, showing a smiling face and a traditional turban, styled as a video thumbnail.
prompt: A photograph of a smiling Punjabi wheat farmer wearing a bright orange‑red turban, standing in the middle of a tall golden wheat field under a clear blue sky. The farmer holds a sheaf of wheat in his right hand, and the composition places him slightly off‑center with a shallow depth of field that keeps the foreground wheat crisp while the background blurs gently. Soft morning light bathes the scene, highlighting the golden tones of the grain and the warm hues of the turban.

description: A vibrant, natural scene of Indian mountains with rolling green hills, distant peaks, and a clear blue sky.
prompt: A photograph of a middle‑aged Indian farmer wearing a plain cotton shirt and khaki trousers standing on rolling dark green hills, with distant snow‑capped peaks of the Western Ghats behind him under a clear soft blue sky. A wooden plow leans against a nearby stone wall, a small herd of goats grazes near a lone mango tree, and gentle midday sunlight illuminates the scene.

description: A serene coastal view of an Indian shoreline with gentle waves, sandy beaches, and a bright horizon.
prompt: A photograph of a tranquil Indian coastline at sunrise, showing gentle turquoise waves lapping a wide expanse of light beige sand, with a solitary wooden fishing boat tied near the shoreline. In the background, a low hill dotted with a few palm trees is illuminated by a bright orange‑yellow horizon.

description: A bustling cityscape showing modern Indian architecture, illuminated streets, and a warm sunset backdrop.
prompt: A photograph of a bustling Indian metropolis at sunset, featuring sleek glass office towers with subtle jali lattice patterns, colourful street stalls, and auto‑rickshaws moving along wide, lamp‑lit avenues. The sky glows amber and soft pink, while streetlights cast warm light onto wet pavement and pedestrians navigating the lively sidewalks.

description: A colorful image of an organic farmer in Maharashtra holding fresh vegetables, with lush green farms in the background, formatted as a video thumbnail.
prompt: A photograph of a farmer from Maharashtra wearing a white dhoti and a light green kurta, standing in a sunlit field and holding a wooden crate filled with bright red tomatoes, orange carrots, and green bell peppers. Behind him, rows of lush dark green paddy crops and a few mango trees stretch under a clear blue sky, with warm golden light casting soft shadows. The scene is composed for a video thumbnail, with the farmer centered and the background gently blurred.

description: A vivid picture of a vineyard owner in Karnataka near grape vines, featuring a smiling farmer and rows of ripe grapes, displayed as a video thumbnail.
prompt: A photograph of a smiling vineyard owner in Karnataka standing amid rows of ripe purple grapes, wearing a light tan shirt and a straw hat. Behind him, gentle hills with teak trees rise under warm golden sunlight, and a wooden crate filled with bunches of grapes rests at his feet.

description: Main website logo showing a stylized AI detective icon combined with agricultural elements, designed in a simple and vibrant style.
Footer version of the AgriKisan logo, simple white monochrome graphic with inverted colors to stand out on the dark background.
Soft orange mesh gradient background with subtle diagonal texture, providing a warm overlay for the hero section.
prompt: A seamless gradient of soft orange fading into light peach, overlaid with a delicate mesh of fine diagonal lines that create a subtle texture. The pattern resembles a light fabric weave, with the diagonal strands spaced evenly and the overall lighting evenly diffused to keep the surface gentle and warm.

description: Circular user avatar placeholder showing a generic silhouette/profile icon in muted tones, used to represent multiple farmer users.
prompt: A circular avatar showing a simple flat silhouette of a farmer wearing a traditional round hat and holding a bundle of straw, rendered in soft grayish‑brown. The silhouette is centered on a light cream background with a subtle inner shadow to give gentle depth, and the overall composition uses muted earth tones that blend smoothly with typical website color palettes.
